chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petitions No.D-204 & 109 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.867/24 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for the petitioners does not press the petitions. Under instructions, both petitions are hereby dismissed, as not pressed. Office to place signed copy of this order in connected captioned matter. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
